app.title: Spirit Solar Yield Calculator
app.subtitle: Sunlight empowers us — calculate light at night, without the grid

location.title: Select location
location.clickMap: Click on the map to select a location
location.polarWarning: Note: at latitudes above 66°, results have limited reliability due to polar night scenarios.

config.title: Panel configuration
config.wpTooltip: Enter the peak power in Watt-peak (Wp) per side of the column
config.lossTooltip: System losses include cable losses, inverter efficiency, dust/soiling on panels, temperature effects and degradation. The default of 5% is a common value for most installations.

errors.pvgisUnavailable: PVGIS is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.locationOutOfRange: This location is outside the PVGIS coverage area.
errors.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.fillLocation: Please select a location on the map first
errors.fillWp: Please enter power per side (at least 1 side > 0 Wp)

footer.disclaimer: Calculations are based on historical data from PVGIS (Photovoltaic Geographical Information System), developed by the Joint Research Centre of the European Commission. Actual yield may differ due to local conditions such as shading, soiling, temperature and panel degradation. This tool is intended as an indication for project preparation.

lighting.title: Advanced: Lighting Designer
lighting.intro: Estimate how long a 48V lighting system can burn each night based on the calculated yield.
lighting.chartTitle: Burn hours vs night hours per month
lighting.recommendationOk: The system achieves a full night of lighting in every month.
lighting.recommendationDim: In the worst-case month only {pct}% of the night is covered. Consider dimming to about {pct}% brightness for full-night coverage.

vraagDennis.title: Ask Dennis
vraagDennis.successBody: Dennis will get back to you as soon as possible.

admin.title: Panel Configuration Management
admin.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this preset?
admin.name: Name
admin.noSupabase: Supabase is not configured. Set the environment variables to manage presets.
